meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: Hacker Artists: AI Punk Quentin Nolot
meta.advanced_seo_description: While the art world wrings its hands over AI, French artist Quentin Nolot is in the back alley turning digital junk into a new punk-rock artistic language.

meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: Small File Rebellion: Hacking Digital Carbon
meta.advanced_seo_description: Forget bloated 4K cat videos — the real rebellion goes small. From Our Networks 2024: small-file media, where every saved byte fights digital excess.

meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: Building Communities That Actually Give a Shit
meta.advanced_seo_description: A raw podcast with Gabriela Arno and Samad Raza on building real community — not another AstroTurf circle jerk. The unfiltered truth about giving a shit.

meta.advanced_seo_description: At Our Networks 2024: Lori Emerson on how forgotten networks, microbroadcasting, and grassroots innovation are quietly reshaping the digital landscape.

meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: Fuck the Status Quo: AI's Messy Love Child with Art
meta.advanced_seo_description: AI isn't the boogeyman or the messiah — it's a rollercoaster, and we're steering. A no-holds-barred tour of creativity and our digital future from Kris Krüg.

meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: Creativity in the Age of AI: June 2024 Meetup
meta.advanced_seo_description: AI meetup or avant-garde creativity festival? Vancouver's June 2024 gathering fused geospatial sound walks, cyborg art, and live beatboxing into one night.

meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: AI Sandbox: My New CBC Radio Early Edition Segment
meta.advanced_seo_description: 'Sandboxing with Kris Krüg' is my new recurring AI segment on CBC's The Early Edition with Stephen Quinn — examining AI's role in our fast-changing world.
The story of Minimum Viable Demos: a Vancouver mashup of creativity, tech, and community where, if you poke the world and shout into the void, it shouts back.

meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: AI is Not Your Friend: Rethink the Relationship
meta.advanced_seo_description: Morten Rand-Hendriksen shatters the AI illusion: stop anthropomorphizing the technology and start seeing it for what it is — a tool, not a digital companion.

meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: AI, Governance & Cybersecurity with Anthony Green
meta.advanced_seo_description: A night with Anthony Green on AI as a puppet master reshaping governance and security — how GPUs and neural nets went from '80s sci-fi to today's overlords.

meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: Rise of the Vancouver Technopunks: Web Summit Our Way
meta.advanced_seo_description: Vancouver didn't just land another tech event. Here's how we're twisting Web Summit to amplify the city's bold, technopunk spirit — hosting it on our terms.

meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: Augie Studio Review: AI-Driven Video Production
meta.advanced_seo_description: A hands-on review of Augie Studio, the platform putting AI directly into creators' hands to democratize high-quality video production. What works, what doesn't.

meta.advanced_seo_description: Partnering with SFU's Metacreation Lab and their open-source tool Autolume — a neural synthesizer fusing my analog photo archive with generative AI.

meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: Building Community at Vancouver Startup Week
meta.advanced_seo_description: Vancouver's drizzle doesn't scream 'entrepreneurship' — but a Vancouver Startup Week panel found our city's real edge: diversity, and a community that shows up.
AI could liberate humanity or enslave us to digital overlords. We're training neural nets on a vast artistic corpus to democratize the tech — a (r)evolution.

meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: Fabric: How You Should Actually Be Using AI
meta.advanced_seo_description: Daniel Miessler's Fabric is a pioneering open-source platform that weaves AI into daily workflows — augmenting human capability instead of replacing it.
Let's double down on a startup culture where underdogs, dreamers, and disruptors all find a place — forging a Vancouver landscape that's supportive and bold.

meta.jetpack_seo_html_title: Unpacking AI Ethics at BCAMA Vision Conf 2024
meta.advanced_seo_description: AI ethics and governance at BCAMA Vision Conference 2024: an elite crew dissects regulatory hurdles and data-privacy landmines — Google AI, Hootsuite, and more.

meta.advanced_seo_description: At the 77th Yorkton Film Festival, Lisa Jackson's 'Wilfred Buck' ignites a cosmic, star-bound documentary that challenges how we tell Indigenous stories.

meta.advanced_seo_description: Guy Kawasaki decrypts the code of becoming a tech titan at Innovate West Vancouver — a cyber-culture take on innovation, from Timbits to the digital whirlwind.
